name: Wi-Fi TV, Inc.
summary: Wi-Fi TV, Inc. offers live television channels and other video-based content through the Internet. It provides media content, including movies, film clips, and electronic books in multiple delivery formats, such as windows media and real player, and through its web site, Wi-FiTV.com, as well as through other related web sites. Wi-Fi TV, Inc. was formerly known as Kanakaris Wireless, Inc. and it changed its name to Wi-Fi TV, Inc. in 2004. The company was incorporated in 1991 and is based in Newport Beach, California.
